name: actuarial-workbench
description: Deploy the Actuarial Workbench accelerator on your own Snowflake data. Maps your payer core (medical + pharmacy claims, membership, reference) to a conformance contract, generates the derived actuarial data product (exposure, paid-development facts, PMPM history, triangles, IBNR, normalized RAF) from templates, and stands up the workbench app.
